title: Sarees
description: Timeless handloom silk and cotton sarees representing centuries of weaving heritage.
weavingHistory: Indian saree weaving dates back thousands of years. Our collections are sourced directly from traditional handloom weaving clusters across India.

title: Salwars
description: Modern and traditional salwars, kurtis, maxis, and co-ord sets crafted in luxury fabrics.
weavingHistory: Designed for comfort and contemporary style, our salwar and kurti collections feature hand-block prints, fine embroideries, and organic cotton weaves.
